common.setupRequired: Configure Supabase: copy .env.example to .env and add your project URL and anon key.
common.networkError: Could not reach Supabase (network error). Check: (1) In the project folder, .env contains VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY exactly (names must start with VITE_). (2) Save the file, stop the dev server, run npm run dev again. (3) URL looks like https://xxxx.supabase.co with no spaces. (4) In Supabase dashboard, the project is not paused. (5) If you deployed (e.g. Vercel), add the same variables in the host’s Environment settings.

home.heroSubtitle: Book the common hall, manage parking stickers, connect with neighbours, and browse local listings — in one place.
home.f1Desc: See availability and book time slots without double booking.
home.f2Desc: Register up to four vehicles per flat for society parking.
home.f3Desc: Office bearers, schools, hospitals — curated by the committee.
home.f4Desc: List items within the community marketplace.
home.accessNote: Access is by approval only. Your request is reviewed by the society committee.

auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account. A committee member will approve your access.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account if required.
auth.accountIssueTitle: We couldn’t load your society profile
auth.accountIssueBody: You’re signed in, but there is no matching row in the members list yet. This can happen right after email confirmation or if the database trigger didn’t run.
auth.accountIssueHint1: Tap Retry after a few seconds if you just confirmed your email.
auth.accountIssueHint2: If it keeps happening, contact the committee — they may need to approve your access or fix your record in the admin panel.

pending.title: Awaiting approval
pending.body: Your registration is pending review by the Sentosa Ekam committee. You will be able to use the portal once your access is approved.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.profileHint: Keep your flat and phone updated for parking and society records.

hall.title: Common society hall
hall.subtitle: Book a slot. Overlapping bookings are not allowed.
hall.invalidRange: End time must be after start time.
hall.overlapError: This time overlaps an existing booking. Choose another slot.

parking.title: Parking stickers
parking.subtitle: Up to four vehicles can be registered per flat.
parking.limitReached: This flat already has four vehicles registered. Remove one before adding another.
parking.limitDb: Vehicle limit reached for this flat.
parking.flatRequired: Your flat number is missing from your profile. Update it or contact the committee.

landmarks.name: Place name
landmarks.title: Nearby landmarks
landmarks.subtitle: Schools, hospitals, and other useful places.

admin.title: Administration
admin.emailHelp: Emails appear after you run supabase/migration_email_on_profiles.sql in the SQL Editor (one-time).
